history.subject: Close the 02KG affine-reduction heart pushPullObj_coverInter_baseChange: carve the restricted cartesian square into a ring pushout (Spec-cartesian implies pushout, by fully-faithful Spec), rewrite the base-changed corner sections as N ⊗_R R' along the corner ring map, and close with the affine brick affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange; FBC leaves 4 → 3; blueprint: heart + tensor-rewrite marked leanok, ring-pushout carve node added, bogus mathlib anchor repointed

Prune the superseded canonical-mate route to flat base change: delete the two unclosable stub theorems affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso and flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso (zero consumers; the live route is the concrete-tilde affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange feeding cech_flatBaseChange) and their four blueprint nodes; repoint the Quot-scheme consumer to the Čech 02KH node; FlatBaseChange.lean is now sorry-free
Update TO_USER: FBC heart closed + mate route pruned (3 leaves remain); v4.31 migration debt verified cleared (49 genuine open sorries remain project-wide)

Hygiene: remove orphaned RationalCurveIso.{body,new,skeletal} chapter fragments from the project root (RR.4 effort never landed — no such Lean module or blueprint chapter exists; content recoverable from ledger history; twin copies remain in SubProjects/Albanese, out of this session's write scope)

Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin closed: pullback of a quasi-coherent sheaf along fromSpec is tilde of its V-sections, with the Sigma-pair unit identity (bijectivity of the base map via unit_leftAdjointUniq + restriction-unit components; iso via the now-live tilde-Gamma counit). QuotScheme sorries 12 -> 11
Blueprint: complete proof for lem:tildeIso_of_isQuasicoherent_isAffineOpen (Stacks 01I8 Step-1 pin) matching the landed Lean proof; mark proof leanok

qcqs section localization (Stacks 01P0 beyond affine): Γ(M,W)→Γ(M,D(g)) is localization at powers g for quasi-coherent M on quasi-compact quasi-separated W, by Mayer–Vietoris induction on compact opens over the affine gap2 keystone
